# Chandra Kant Budhalakoti

> Frontend Engineer with 2+ years of experience building scalable, production-grade web applications with React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, Nuxt.js and TypeScript. Based in Haldwani, Uttarakhand, India.

## About

Chandra Kant Budhalakoti is a Frontend Engineer at Trigital Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (Apr 2024 – Present). He specialises in component-driven architecture, reusable design systems, performant rendering (SSR/CSR), REST API integration, and pixel-accurate UI. He has shipped enterprise dashboards, task-management platforms, AI-powered chatbots, and large-scale e-commerce applications.

## Core Skills

- Languages: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, Node.js
- Frameworks: React.js, Next.js (App Router), Vue.js, Nuxt.js
- State: Redux Toolkit, Zustand, Vuex, Context API
- Styling: Tailwind CSS, SCSS, Material UI, DaisyUI, Figma
- Backend/APIs: Express.js, REST APIs, Axios, Authentication
- DevOps: Git, Docker, Vercel, Railway, Netlify

## Selected Projects

- PDF Lab — Open-source full-stack PDF processing platform (Next.js, TypeScript, Express.js, Node.js, Docker).
- Enterprise Task Tracker — Jira/ClickUp-style project management app (React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS).
- Production E-Commerce Platform — Customer-facing storefront with SSR (Vue.js, Nuxt.js, Vuex).
- AI Powered Chatbot Platform — Dynamic, multilingual conversational interfaces (Vue.js, REST APIs).
- Trigital Technologies Website — SEO-optimised company website (Next.js, Tailwind CSS).

## Education

- Master of Computer Applications (MCA), Uttarakhand Technical University, 2024
- Bachelor of Arts (BA), Kumaon University, 2022
